  "findings": [
    "Drain slope is under 1/4 inch per foot, which violates IPC 704 for horizontal drainage piping.",
    "Risk of solids stranding due to insufficient slope, potentially causing blockages and system failure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt further work on this drain run.",
    "Remove and reinstall the affected piping segment with proper slope per IPC 704.",
    "Re-inspect slope after correction before closing out rough-in."
  ],
  "rationale": "IPC 704 requires a minimum slope of 1/4 inch per foot for horizontal drainage piping to ensure self-scouring flow. The observed condition describes a slope under 1/4 inch per foot with visible solids stranding, indicating non-compliance and a high risk of drainage failure. As the work is at rough-complete but not closed out, immediate correction is required before proceeding.",
  "references": ["IPC 704"]
}
